name: Iron Vanguard
bio: Founded in the industrial heartland, Iron Vanguard built their identity around relentless pressure and defensive solidarity. Known for never conceding the first point without a fight.

name: Coastal Drift
bio: Born from a beachside community league, Coastal Drift play a fluid possession-based style that mirrors the rhythm of the tides. Their fanbase is as passionate as the surf.

name: Sierra Wolves
bio: Forged in the mountain valleys of the interior, Sierra Wolves are renowned for their stamina and pack mentality. They rarely win by much but they almost always win.

name: Crimson Meridian
bio: A club built by a coalition of local youth academies, Crimson Meridian has long been a pipeline for emerging talent. Their aggressive pressing style makes them a nightmare to face.
